thought.text: Excellent! This is gold for reward modeling - 9 tasks with actual variance. Let me now check Weave connectivity and build the evaluator framework:

action.command:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export WANDB_API_KEY="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" && python3 << 'EOF'
import weave

# Initialize Weave with the project
client = weave.init("sviluppo-ac/reward-modeling-v2")
print(f"Weave initialized: {client}")
print(f"Project: sviluppo-ac/reward-modeling-v2")
print("Connection successful!")
EOF
